nasb.text: So they took Joseph’s tunic, and slaughtered a male goat and dipped the tunic in the blood;

esv.text: Then they took Joseph’s robe and slaughtered a goat and dipped the robe in the blood.

cnv.text: 於是，他們宰了一隻公山羊，把約瑟的長衣蘸在血裡；

ccb.text: 他们宰了一只公山羊，把血染在约瑟的彩衣上，

csbs.text: 他们拿来约瑟的袍子，宰杀了一只公山羊，把袍子浸了血；
